name: SENTINEL AML/CFT
description: Open, agent-native AML/CFT compliance layer for Web3. Pay-per-query via x402 micropayments (USDC on Base). Screen wallets against 12,745+ sanctioned/blacklisted crypto addresses (OFAC SDN, USDT Blacklist, Ransomwhere, OpenSanctions, UK OFSI). Screen entities against 1.1M+ watchlist records (sanctions, PEP, Interpol, debarment). Compound wallet+entity screening with convergence detection. 179-country jurisdiction risk. Registered ERC-8004 agent #27961 on Base.
